name: csv-to-json
goal: Read the CSV file at sales.csv (a header row plus several data rows with columns id, region, amount). Write a JSON file at sales.json containing a list of objects, one per CSV data row, with the same column names as keys. Numeric columns (id, amount) must be JSON numbers, not strings.

notes.purpose: Tier 1 deterministic CSV→JSON conversion. The amount-as-number regex catches the common LLM mistake of leaving every value as a string after csv.DictReader.
